context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles a user correction by locating the incorrect content, updating it in the vault, and only continuing the next task after the fix is saved.

checklist.name: search called to locate incorrect content
checklist.description: Agent called search to find the block containing the incorrect '--force' statement before attempting a fix

checklist.name: update_block called with correct content
checklist.description: Agent called update_block replacing the incorrect statement with the corrected version (no --force flag, removed to prevent deletion)

checklist.name: Did not continue before saving
checklist.description: Agent did not move on to the rollback review task until confirming the correction was saved

checklist.name: No verbal-only acknowledgement
checklist.description: Agent did not merely say 'noted' or 'understood' without making an actual update_block call
